title: Proportional Reasoning with Recipes
context: Bread recipe (makes 1 loaf): 500g strong flour, 7g yeast, 10g salt, 300ml warm water, 30ml olive oil.

questions.question: To make 3 loaves, how much flour?
To make 1.5 loaves, how much water?
Flour costs £1.50 per kg. Cost for 3 loaves?
You only have 350g flour. What fraction of the recipe can you make?
